name: form
visual_summary: A form component is a container for collecting information from a user. It would be used whenever a user needs to submit data, such as when signing up for an account or filling out a survey. This component is typically used in conjunction with buttons to submit the form data.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: form
Description: A form component is a container for collecting information from a user. It would be used whenever a user needs to submit data, such as when signing up for an account or filling out a survey. This component is typically used in conjunction with buttons to submit the form data.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: form, input

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/react/src/components/form/form.tsx
"use client";

import type {ComponentPropsWithRef} from "react";

import React from "react";
import {Form as FormPrimitive} from "react-aria-components/Form";

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 * Form Root
 * -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
interface FormRootProps extends ComponentPropsWithRef<typeof FormPrimitive> {}
